body:
This PR adds an end-to-end test for the surfacefluxes perfect model experiment.

Content
- Add `calibrate`, which runs the full calibration pipeline in a single function. This requires that the proper environment and model interface has already been loaded
- Use `calibrate` in the pipeline.jl (tested locally)
- Add end-to-end test using `calibrate` in `test/test_sf.jl`. I am a bit concerned that the parameter values are incorrect, since they do not match the default parameter values. 
- Add a unit test to ensure `calibrate` errors properly without the correct model interface
- resolve the surfacefluxes experiment Manifest
- Update the GHA
title: Add surfacefluxes test to CI

body:
- Remove ClimaCore as a dependency, set compat for ClimaParams
- Update slurm pipeline to unify logging into one file, except for individual model runs. 
- Clean up log statements slightly
title: Unify logging for slurm pipeline
